description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive combination of dark metal and reddish-brown wooden components. The receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from blackened steel, while the handguard, stock, and pistol grip are made from polished wood, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle features a curved detachable magazine, a fixed wooden stock, and a standard-length barrel with a simple front sight post. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly visible, as is the charging handle on the right side. The overall design is iconic, with a utilitarian form factor and visible mechanical details. The finish is a mix of glossy metal and matte wood, with some minor surface texture visible on the wooden parts.
description: A classic assault rifle with black metal and reddish-brown wooden parts, featuring a curved magazine and fixed wooden stock. The design is robust and utilitarian, with visible mechanical details.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and trigger assembly.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, showing the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel, with the magazine and trigger barely visible.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the charging handle, magazine release, and the detailed contours of the receiver and wooden components.
